help.title: TMS Embarcador Log Axis
help.selectTopic: Select a topic from the side menu to view help content.
help.feedbackThanks: Thank you! We're glad it was helpful.
help.feedbackImprove: Thank you for the feedback! We will improve this section.

content.introText1: TMS Embarcador Log Axis is a complete transportation management solution (TMS - Transportation Management System) for logistics and transportation companies, offering total control over freight and distribution operations.
content.introText2: TMS Embarcador Log Axis helps manage all aspects of your logistics operation, providing real-time information access through an integrated system. The application is divided into several modules, each covering a different operational function.
content.introText3: TMS Embarcador Log Axis was developed to be a flexible and scalable solution. The application is available via web, with interfaces optimized for desktop and mobile devices.
content.introNote: This online help applies to the current version of TMS Embarcador Log Axis. If a feature or function is available in only one version, this should be clearly stated.
content.dashboardText: The Dashboard is the main screen of TMS Embarcador Log Axis, offering an overview of real-time transport operations.
content.ordersText: Module responsible for controlling and monitoring all transport orders.
content.invoicesText: Complete management of invoices related to transport operations.
content.ctesText: Complete control of issued and received transport documents.
content.calculatorText: Tool for freight calculation based on configurable tables.
content.calculatorFeature1: Calculation by weight, volume and distance

infoExcedente.title: Calculation Type: Surplus
infoExcedente.subtitle: How it works:
infoExcedente.desc1: In the "Surplus" type, the final value is calculated by adding the value of the previous range to the surplus multiplied by the value per KG.

infoSemTaxas.title: Tax Type: Without Taxes
infoSemTaxas.subtitle: Attention:
infoSemTaxas.desc1: When a line has Tax Type = "Without taxes", the system will IGNORE all additional taxes configured in the fields above (GRIS, Toll, SECCAT, Dispatch, ITR, TAS, Collection/Delivery, SUFRAMA Tax, etc.).
infoSemTaxas.desc2: The calculation will consider ONLY the range value (Weight Freight + Value Freight).

instructions.title: How to get Google Maps credentials:
instructions.step3: Go to "APIs and Services" > "Library" and enable: <1>Geocoding API</1>, <3>Maps JavaScript API</3>, and <5>Places API</5>
instructions.costs1: Google Maps Platform is not free for continuous production use. Requests (such as coordinate extraction, distance calculation, or address autocomplete) generate costs in dollars according to the official Google table.
instructions.costs2: It is mandatory to have a billing account (credit card) linked to Google Cloud, even if Google offers a recurring monthly credit of $200. We recommend setting up quotas/limits per API in the Console to avoid unexpected charges.

costs.title: OpenAI API Costs:
costs.warning1: The OpenAI API requires pre-paid credits or a configured billing method. If your balance expires or there is no credit card added on the platform ("Billing"), the system will return a limit exceeded error and the intelligence automation will stop responding.
costs.warning2: You will be charged per token (fraction of words) sent or received during data extraction from AI engines. Also pay attention to the choice of models; newer models like GPT-4 have significantly higher rates than base models like GPT-3.5.

modalReviews.empty: No reviews found for the selected period

modalHowCalc.title: How is NPS Calculated?
modalHowCalc.clientDesc: The Final Client NPS measures end-customer satisfaction with the delivery service provided by carriers. The client evaluates on a scale from 0 to 10.
modalHowCalc.clientPromoters: Promoters: Extremely satisfied clients who actively recommend the service.
modalHowCalc.clientNeutrals: Neutrals: Satisfied but unenthusiastic clients who are vulnerable to competitive offerings.
modalHowCalc.clientDetractors: Detractors: Dissatisfied clients who can damage your brand through negative word-of-mouth.
modalHowCalc.formulaDesc: The result varies from -100 (everyone is a detractor) down to +100 (everyone is a promoter). Neutral clients are not factored into the calculation directly.
modalHowCalc.internalDesc: The Internal NPS is calculated automatically by the system based on objective performance metrics from carriers during a specific period.
modalHowCalc.mat1_desc: Percentage of deliveries made within the established timeframe. Highest weight in the final calculation.
modalHowCalc.mat2_desc: Percentage of deliveries with problems, damages, losses, or other negative occurrences. Negatively impacts the score.
modalHowCalc.mat3_desc: Average time for updating tracking. Lower time = better score.
modalHowCalc.mat4_desc: Average time for submitting Proof of Delivery. Agility is valued.
modalHowCalc.intFormDesc: The final score is normalized to be between 0 and 10, then converted to the NPS scale (-100 to +100).
modalHowCalc.intAutoRatingDesc: The Internal NPS is automatically calculated by the system at the end of each evaluation period, ensuring objectivity and consistency in performance analysis.

howTo.title: How to get credentials:
howTo.step3: Add the "WhatsApp" product to your app
howTo.step4: In "API Setup" you will find the Phone Number ID and can generate the Access Token
howTo.step5: The Business Account ID is available in WhatsApp Business settings
howTo.warning1: WhatsApp operates exclusively on pay-per-use, based on messaging and templates. Each message sent — particularly business-initiated ones — incurs costs according to Meta's official pricing.
howTo.warning2: We recommend setting consumption limits in your BSP dashboard to avoid unexpected charges.
howTo.warning3: Remember: in addition to per-message charges, there is also the fixed monthly rate for the feature, as per your contract.

fields.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, GIF or WebP. Max 5MB.
fields.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep current password

hints.protectedUserDesc: This is the main administrator user. Some changes might be restricted to maintain system security.
hints.autoCodeDesc: Codes are automatically generated sequentially starting at 0001. This field cannot be manually edited.
hints.accessManager: Access to reports and operations management
hints.customPermissionsDesc: You selected the "Custom" role. Go to the "Permissions" tab to configure specific access permissions for this user.
hints.customPermissionsExtra: Select the menu options this user can access. Check or uncheck boxes to configure permissions. Selecting a parent menu automatically includes all its submenus.
hints.languageSaveHint: When saving, the selected language will be applied immediately across the entire system (menus, screens, buttons, etc.)
hints.languageUserHint: This language will be used to display the system for this user.
hints.establishmentLimitations: Only permitted establishments are shown in this list.
hints.autoZipDesc: Enter the Zip Code to automatically populate city, state, and neighborhood. City and state fields cannot be manually edited.

messages.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete user
messages.deleteConfirmWarning: This action cannot be undone and all settings associated with this user will be lost.
messages.blockConfirmText: Are you sure you want to block user
messages.blockConfirmWarning: The user will no longer be able to access the system.
messages.unblockConfirmText: Are you sure you want to unblock user
messages.resetPasswordConfirmText: Are you sure you want to reset the password for user
messages.resetPasswordConfirmWarning: An email will be sent with instructions for resetting the password.
messages.impersonateConfirmText: Are you sure you want to access the system as user
messages.impersonateConfirmWarning: You will need to log back in to revert to your account.
messages.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

stats.securityAccessDesc: The system features strict access control with different permission levels and activity monitoring.

blocked.title: Blocked Users
blocked.subtitle: Manage users whose access has been blocked
blocked.emptyState: No blocked users at the moment.
blocked.emptyDesc: Users who exceed login attempts or are manually blocked will automatically appear here.
blocked.reasonMultiple: Users blocked due to multiple failed login attempts

establishments.title: User Establishments
establishments.desc: Select the establishments this user can access. After logging in, the user must select one of the allowed establishments to start working.

securityAlerts.title: Security Alert
securityAlerts.attempts: This user has {{attempts}} recent failed attempts.
securityAlerts.autoBlocked: The account has been automatically blocked.
securityAlerts.willBlock: More attempts will block the account.
securityAlerts.blockedDesc: This user cannot access the system at the moment. An administrator must edit the profile to remove the block or reset the password.

permissions.customProfileDesc: This user has specific permissions defined individually, not following any standard system role.

establishments.restrictedAccessDesc: The user's access is limited only to the establishments listed below. They will not be able to view data from other units.
establishments.mainDescHas: The default establishment for login is
establishments.mainDescHasNot: The user does not have a default establishment configured.
